title: Shulker Stalker
description: Warns the user when they leave their shulker box to despawn.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BnWqj41H1qs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description
A mod that warns the user when they leave their shulker box to despawn. It works by detecting when the player breaks a shulker box, then tracking it with a timer that stops when you pick up its item. If you don't pick it up in time, a warning will be displayed.

## Config
At the moment, the mod has the following config settings:
- Enabled: enables the mod. Simply disable so as not to have the mod do anything. On by default.
- Timer: determines the amount of time you have to pick up your shulkerbox after breaking it, before the mod sends its warning message. In ticks. The default is 100, which is 5 seconds.
- Apply glowing: Whether or not to make the shulkerbox you left glow when you leave it. On by default.
- Remind timer: determines the amount of time in between repetitions of warning messages after the first one. The default is 100 ticks, which is 5 seconds.
- Warning sound: toggles the warning sound. Enabled by default.
- Flash warning message: toggles whether or not the warning message should blink. Off by default
- Warning message: The message the game sends when the player leaves their shulkerbox. The default is "Warning: Shulker box not picked up!".
- Warning message color: The color of the warning message. The default is a dark red.

## A special thanks to:
- NotchArrow, for making the mod icon, which once again rocks
- Mumbo Jumbo, for letting his shulker box despawn, inspiring me to counter a mistake I made many times myself
